    rw [IsIso.comm_square_iff (preservesLimitIso F K').hom (preservesLimitIso F K').inv _ _] at this
    · exact this
    · rw [Iso.inv_hom_id, Category.comp_id]
      exact (preservesLimitIso_hom_naturality η K').symm
  have h' : c.pt ≅ limit K' := IsLimit.conePointUniqueUpToIso hc (limit.isLimit K')
  rw [IsIso.comm_square_iff (F.map h'.hom) (F.map h'.inv) _ _]
  · exact h
  · rw [Iso.inv_hom_id, Category.comp_id, η.naturality]

by
  apply preservesLimitsOfSize_of_createsLimitsOfSize
  apply createsLimitsOfSize_of_fullyFaithful
  intro J _ K
  refine ⟨limit (K ⋙ solidToCondensed), ?_, ⟨Iso.refl _⟩⟩
  constructor
  let T := ihom (P ℤ)
  let F := K ⋙ solidToCondensed
  let Φ := pre (oneMinusShift ℤ)
  let i := preservesLimitIso T F
  have : i.hom ≫ Φ.app (limit F) = limit.map (whiskerRight Φ F) ≫ i.hom := by
    apply (limit.isLimit (T ⋙ F)).hom_ext
    intro j
    simp only [assoc, PreservesLimitIso.hom_π, Functor.mapCone_π_app, NatTrans.naturality,
      limit.cone_π, ← T.map_comp]
    rfl
  rw [← IsIso.inv_hom_id_apply i.hom (Φ.app (limit F)), ← assoc, this, assoc]
  have : ∀ j, IsIso ((whiskerRight Φ F).app j) := fun j ↦ (K.obj j).isSolid.1
  have : IsIso (limit.map (whiskerRight Φ F)) := Limits.isIso_lim _
  infer_instance

by
  have : CreatesLimits solidToCondensed := createsLimitsOfFull _ (fun {J} _ K ↦ ⟨fun c hc ↦ ⟨
    ⟨c.cone.pt, by
      change IsIso ((pre (oneMinusShift ℤ)).app c.cone.pt)
      let F := internalHom (P ℤ)
      have : PreservesLimits F := inferInstance
      let hcF := isLimitOfPreserves F hc
      have : ∀ j, IsIso ((whiskerLeft (K ⋙ solidToCondensed) (pre (oneMinusShift ℤ))).app j) :=
        fun j ↦ by
          have : IsSolid ((K ⋙ solidToCondensed).obj j) := (K.obj j).isSolid
          exact IsSolid.oneMinusShift_induces_iso
      exact hcF.hom_isIso hcF (whiskerLeft _ (pre (oneMinusShift ℤ)))⟩,
    Iso.refl _⟩⟩)
  infer_instance
